priorityRule: P0 blockers before P1 production depth; postponed tasks never auto-resume.

gates.name: 治理、范围与可复现基线
工程、数据、资产和参考项目审计
生产工具链与配置契约
可维护的模块化运行时
exitEvidence: zero unintended unreachable entities or actions
save migration and corruption recovery tests

gates.name: 产品内容、UI/UX 与资产生产
内容扩展与编辑效率
exitEvidence: second chapter package proves generic runtime reuse

gates.name: 候选发布、商店部署与运营回滚

tasks.title: 项目治理、证据与范围基线
acceptance: Runtime repository and evidence workspace are separated.
Tracked, shipping, generated and forbidden roots are machine-readable.
Baseline can be rebuilt and verified.

tasks.title: Git、CI 与 Android 身份闭环
acceptance: Android package identity is consistent.
CI runs the active Wuxia gates.
Generated APK and evidence are excluded from Git.

tasks.title: Codex Game Development OS 2.3.0 项目 Overlay
acceptance: Only HTML/Web + Capacitor is active.
Upstream package remains read-only evidence outside the repository.
Project overlay is schema-validated and reproducible.

tasks.title: 玩家目标与 PSFCD 体验链基线
acceptance: Every active screen has player goal, input and required feedback.
The 11 x 3 visual acceptance obligation is explicit.
Combat UX is marked postponed rather than falsely accepted.

tasks.title: 需求到程序、配置、资产和测试追踪
acceptance: Each production domain has one authority and one accountable owner.
Open work has a task ID and acceptance evidence.
Facts, inferences and unknowns are separated.

tasks.title: 当前仓库全量重审计
acceptance: Active HTML runtime, config, Android text project, tools and Markdown evidence are inventoried.
Dormant Nova and historical UE material is separated from active truth.
Current gates are rerun instead of trusting stale reports.

tasks.title: 参考项目功能、工具与资源采用审计
acceptance: Adopt, adapt and reject decisions are recorded.
Reference gameplay content is not copied into Wuxia configuration.
Browser, asset and release tool patterns are mapped to project tasks.

tasks.title: 资产来源与运输资格登记
acceptance: Every registered asset has provenance, license status and adoption disposition.
Only approved project-owned assets may ship.
Competitor APK assets are research-only.

tasks.title: 生产合同校验与报告生成工具
acceptance: All production configs pass JSON Schema and semantic validation.
Task dependencies are acyclic.
Shipping assets exist and match SHA-256.

tasks.title: 生产配置 Schema 与版本化契约
acceptance: Profile, subsystems, UI, assets, toolchain and stage plan are schema-validated.
No absolute source path is required for validation.
Generated reports never become source authority.

tasks.title: 拆分 1938 行 Runtime 与 1229 行 UI 控制器
acceptance: Condition, result, navigation, entity, persistence and UI adapters expose typed contracts.
Concrete chapter content remains in configuration.
Existing snapshots and event semantics remain backward compatible.

tasks.title: FB01 实体与动作可达性逐项裁决
acceptance: Every unreachable record is classified as repair, intentional dormant or remove-from-active-config.
No player-facing action is silently unreachable.
Reachability audit is deterministic and repeatable.

tasks.title: 358/358 全动作前后状态断言
acceptance: All 358 actions have availability, dispatch and before/after state assertions.
Rejected actions produce zero mutation.
Accepted actions prove an intended state delta or declared narrative-only outcome.

tasks.title: 存档版本、迁移、损坏恢复与回滚
acceptance: Versioned save DTO and migration chain exist.
Interrupted write and malformed save recovery are tested.
Rollback compatibility is documented.

tasks.title: 武侠运行时事件、日志与回放语义
acceptance: Player intent, result, rejection and state delta events have stable schemas.
Events carry build, config and save version.
A first-session replay can diagnose divergence.

tasks.title: UI 定义、导航、交互和反馈适配器拆分
acceptance: Screen content and transitions remain configuration-driven.
DOM bindings are isolated from domain state.
Legacy shooting CSS is excluded from the Wuxia shipping style bundle.

tasks.title: 11 屏乘 3 尺寸视觉与交互验收
acceptance: 33 screen-viewport pairs have screenshots and machine observations.
Console error and warning counts are zero.
No critical overflow, blocked controls or invisible feedback remains.

tasks.title: 自有 AssetRegistry 接入运行时
acceptance: Runtime resolves logical asset IDs through the registry.
Missing or unapproved assets fail activation.
Build contains no reference-only asset.

tasks.title: 项目化 Browser Surface 与 Modal Sweep
acceptance: Tool consumes the Wuxia UI registry rather than hard-coded shooting screens.
Failure captures screenshot, DOM, state, console and viewport.
The runner is deterministic and returns non-zero on blockers.

tasks.title: Android 启动图标与启动页资产集
acceptance: All Android densities are generated from an approved project source.
Adaptive icon and launch screen are visually verified.
Hashes and source provenance are registered.

tasks.title: 中文武侠字体选择、授权、子集与预算
acceptance: Display and body fonts have verified redistribution terms.
Chinese glyph coverage and readability pass all three viewports.
Subset and fallback behavior meet package budget.

tasks.title: 章节地图材质与节点状态资产
acceptance: Available, locked, selected and completed states are visually distinct.
Assets use logical IDs and budgets.
No competitor pixels are included.

tasks.title: NPC 肖像与身份反馈资产系统
acceptance: Portrait definitions are data-driven.
Fallback and missing states are explicit.
Per-file provenance is complete.

tasks.title: 交互、奖励、锁定与反馈图标族
acceptance: Icons have semantic IDs and consistent states.
Text remains available for accessibility and ambiguity avoidance.
Assets pass budget and ownership gates.

tasks.title: 第二章节 Feature Package 复用验证
acceptance: A second chapter is added without chapter-specific code branches.
Definition, rule, composition and runtime instance boundaries remain intact.
Config diff and rollback are validated.

tasks.title: 内容编辑器 ROI 决策
acceptance: Repeated authoring bottlenecks are measured.
A no-editor, script-tool or editor decision is recorded.
Any editor proposal includes validation, diff, undo and preview.

tasks.title: 真实 Rest/Repair 与 CombatSession
acceptance: Resume only after explicit product-owner authorization.
Combat uses a deterministic real session rather than a fixed auto-win timeline.
Rest and repair prove resource cost and before/after state.

tasks.title: 发布信任边界、隐私与权限审计
acceptance: Android permissions match actual runtime needs.
No secrets or development evidence ship.
Privacy disclosure matches collected data.

tasks.title: 签名 Release AAB/APK 与可复现构建
acceptance: Release build is signed outside the repository.
Source commit, config hashes and packaged bytes are traceable.
A clean rebuild reproduces the declared artifact set.

tasks.title: 真机、性能、兼容性与商店检查
acceptance: Supported Android versions and representative devices pass.
Startup, memory, frame stability, offline and restore paths pass.
Store listing, screenshots and policy checklist are complete.

tasks.title: 分阶段发布、监控、事故响应与回滚演练
acceptance: Staged rollout thresholds and stop conditions are configured.
Crash, startup, save and progression signals are monitored.
Rollback or hotfix rehearsal has evidence.
